_setup_instructions.vote_threshold: Minimum votes to surface a finding (default: 3 = majority of 5)
_setup_instructions.max_context_files: Max context files beyond changed files (default: 15)
_setup_instructions.min_confidence: Findings below this confidence get a 'low confidence' warning (default: 0.5)
_setup_instructions.category_weights: Learned from resolution rate data. 1.0 = full weight, 0.1 = suppressed. Updated by scripts/update-weights.sh
